creator: reg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

On Tue, Jul 25, 2000 at 09:24:50AM -0400, David Krinsky wrote:
> Do you happen to know if any effort has been made to get this FreeBSD
> fix included in the primary libtool distribution?

Based on past experience, I've given up trying to feed patches back to
any FSF related projects.  Those projects that actually bother to reply,
normally take the line that FreeBSD is doing the wrong thing.  libtool
will be especially tickly, because I bastardised^H^H^Hfixed it for the
ports collection, and I don't feel like explaining why to the authors.

Regards,
 -Jeremy

-- 
FreeBSD - Because the best things in life are free...
                                           http://www.freebsd.org/
